since_last: 56% of 89 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads +1.46%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.53% · BTC +2.74% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 +0.01%. 56% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at +1.46%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.46%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +12.85%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +12.85%, OKLO +4.66%, OKLO +4.66%, RXRX +3.82%, SMR +3.73%. Laggards: KLAC -5.92%, TSLA -5.53%, LRCX -4.91%, AMAT -4.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.93% at $159.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
